summary: Completed frontend testing of Admin CMS sidebar redesign with grouped navigation. All 8 features tested and verified working: 6 grouped sections, expand/collapse functionality, active section highlighting, all 16 sections accessible, sidebar collapse toggle, dashboard quick actions, badge counts, and user profile/logout visibility.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar redesign fully tested. All 6 groups (Tableau de bord, Programmes, Gestion, Communication, Contenu, Paramètres) working with expand/collapse. All 16 sub-items accessible. Collapse toggle [data-testid='sidebar-toggle'] works. Active section has blue border highlight. Breadcrumb shows parent group > section name. Quick action buttons on dashboard navigate correctly.

sidebar_groups.dashboard: PASS - Single item group, navigates to Vue d'ensemble
sidebar_groups.programs: PASS - Expands to show Offres, Universités, Bourses
sidebar_groups.management: PASS - Expands to show Utilisateurs, Candidatures, Logements
sidebar_groups.communication: PASS - Expands to show Messages, Chat en direct, Contacts, Newsletter
sidebar_groups.content: PASS - Expands to show Bannières, Témoignages, FAQ
sidebar_groups.settings: PASS - Expands to show Paiements, Conditions

sidebar_features.chevron_icons: PASS - All groups have chevron icons that rotate on expand
sidebar_features.expand_collapse: PASS - Clicking group header expands/collapses sub-items
sidebar_features.active_highlighting: PASS - Active section has blue border (border-blue-400, border-r-2)
sidebar_features.badge_counts: PASS - Items with notifications show red badge counts
sidebar_features.user_profile: PASS - User avatar and name visible in sidebar footer
